name: pkcs-m3c-retrieval-quality-validation
title: brainstorm: PKCS M3C retrieval quality validation and multilingual roadmap
description: Design the post-M3B validation and long-term multilingual retrieval roadmap: expand eval coverage, compare planned retrieval quality, and define criteria for future semantic/hybrid retrieval.
creator: tantless
notes: M3C design started on 2026-06-22 after M3B completion. User selected MVP option 2: implement eval schema v2 plus simple-vs-planned comparator/report first, and defer the first expanded diagnostic query set to a follow-up task. Semantic/hybrid retrieval remains deferred until diagnostics show repeated lexical failure classes. PR1 schema v2 is implemented and verified: optional diagnostic metadata is accepted, v1 rows default to locked_regression, and tests cover compatibility and validation.
